title: UNITED KINGDOM enforcement action against Reddit, Inc. (16,610,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The UK DPA has imposed a fine of £14,472,500 (EUR 16,610,000) on Reddit, Inc. The controller offers a social media platform that is also available in the UK. The platform enables users to interact with each other and also, but not exclusively, includes content that may be inappropriat...
